title: Personal OS — MuranoOS, a personal operating system, local workbench, and project foundation
public_claim: A local personal operating system for project development, not a private life-management page.
distinctive_mechanism: Projects move through departments, rooms, subrooms, agents, commands, source records, task state, review surfaces, and release outputs while preserving local memory and upstream/downstream handoffs. The local build is grounded in a Tauri / React / Rust / SQLite desktop architecture that can host project workstations rather than only static notes.
use_value: It demonstrates operating-system thinking for intellectual work: serious projects need state, roles, instruments, review loops, continuity, and local software infrastructure, not scattered chats and folders.

flagship_proof_builds.name: Room-state operating loop proof
flagship_proof_builds.claim: MuranoOS is a local operating environment for project work, not a static planning page.
flagship_proof_builds.input: room contract, task/action, state table, agent or expert assignment, and output packet
flagship_proof_builds.operation: route the action through local runtime state and write the result back to room history
flagship_proof_builds.expected_output: room/action/state record with source, decision, next action, and export boundary
flagship_proof_builds.verification_check: open one room, create or inspect one action, and show the persisted state record and governing room contract

component_proofs.claim_supported: sets the design law before code is treated as authoritative; the step records the decision path so the reader can see how the project moves from input to governed output.
component_proofs.input: pass documents, master spec, department rules, room definitions, expert standards, and governance rules
component_proofs.expected_output: room and department constitution as a reviewable artifact
component_proofs.current_evidence: Expected proof artifact: room and department constitution as a reviewable artifact
component_proofs.verification_check: Open or inspect the local runtime path for Canon Layer; confirm a room, action, or state record traces to the governing contract.

component_proofs.claim_supported: turns the operating system into a local desktop application rather than a cloud dashboard or note file
component_proofs.input: React UI, Tauri command bridge, Rust sidecar, Vite frontend, and Windows desktop runtime
component_proofs.expected_output: running local workstation surface as a reviewable artifact
component_proofs.current_evidence: Expected proof artifact: running local workstation surface as a reviewable artifact
component_proofs.verification_check: Open or inspect the local runtime path for Tauri / React / Rust Runtime; confirm a room, action, or state record traces to the governing contract.

component_proofs.claim_supported: persists room work and routes frontend actions through typed local commands; the step records the decision path so the reader can see how the project moves from input to governed output.
component_proofs.input: 182 tables, 149 IPC commands, route registry, room records, decisions, agent runs, expert assignments, and project state
component_proofs.expected_output: queryable local operating state as a reviewable artifact
component_proofs.current_evidence: Expected proof artifact: queryable local operating state as a reviewable artifact
component_proofs.verification_check: Open or inspect the local runtime path for SQLite Command And State Layer; confirm a room, action, or state record traces to the governing contract.

component_proofs.input: room purpose, sources, tasks, state, expert faculty, instruments, and fidelity expectations

component_proofs.claim_supported: prevents a compiled feature from being called complete when it does not yet satisfy canon or expert-quality obligations
component_proofs.input: room fidelity standards, pass/fail blockers, production readiness gates, and unresolved TypeScript/canon drift
component_proofs.expected_output: claim ceiling and next build queue as a reviewable artifact
component_proofs.current_evidence: Expected proof artifact: claim ceiling and next build queue as a reviewable artifact
component_proofs.verification_check: Open or inspect the local runtime path for Fidelity / Platinum Readiness Gates; confirm a room, action, or state record traces to the governing contract.

minimum_public_demo: open one room, create or inspect one action, and show the persisted state record and governing room contract
claim_ceiling: The page may claim proof-structured components and visible verification targets. It may not claim external validation, production deployment, or completed empirical findings unless the project-specific record states those facts.
